name: postman-repo
description: Postman / Newman 集合：PM testnet event list demo

scripts.pm:event-list: newman run postman/collections/pm-ce-testnet-event-list.postman_collection.json --reporters cli,json,junit,htmlextra --reporter-json-export reports/newman-event-list.json --reporter-junit-export reports/newman-event-list.xml --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/newman-dashboard.html --reporter-htmlextra-template postman/templates/htmlextra-inline-dashboard.hbs --reporter-htmlextra-browserTitle "PM CE Newman" --reporter-htmlextra-title "PM CE · testnet" --reporter-htmlextra-noSyntaxHighlighting --reporter-htmlextra-timezone "Asia/Shanghai" && node scripts/newman-json-to-zh-html.mjs reports/newman-event-list.json reports/controllers/pm-ce-event-list.html --controller pm-ce-event-list
scripts.pm:admin-sync: newman run postman/collections/pm-admin-sync-controller.postman_collection.json -e postman/environments/pm-admin-testnet.private.postman_environment.json --reporters cli,json,junit,htmlextra --reporter-json-export reports/newman-admin-sync.json --reporter-junit-export reports/newman-admin-sync.xml --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/newman-admin-sync-dashboard.html --reporter-htmlextra-template postman/templates/htmlextra-inline-dashboard.hbs --reporter-htmlextra-browserTitle "PM Admin Sync Newman" --reporter-htmlextra-title "PM Admin · testnet" --reporter-htmlextra-noSyntaxHighlighting --reporter-htmlextra-timezone "Asia/Shanghai" && node scripts/newman-json-to-zh-html.mjs reports/newman-admin-sync.json reports/controllers/pm-admin-sync-testnet.html --controller pm-admin-sync-testnet
scripts.pm:admin-sync:local: newman run postman/collections/pm-admin-sync-controller.postman_collection.json -e postman/environments/pm-admin-local.postman_environment.json --reporters cli,json,junit,htmlextra --reporter-json-export reports/newman-admin-sync-local.json --reporter-junit-export reports/newman-admin-sync-local.xml --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/newman-admin-sync-local-dashboard.html --reporter-htmlextra-template postman/templates/htmlextra-inline-dashboard.hbs --reporter-htmlextra-browserTitle "PM Admin Sync Newman" --reporter-htmlextra-title "PM Admin · local" --reporter-htmlextra-noSyntaxHighlighting --reporter-htmlextra-timezone "Asia/Shanghai" && node scripts/newman-json-to-zh-html.mjs reports/newman-admin-sync-local.json reports/controllers/pm-admin-sync-local.html --controller pm-admin-sync-local
scripts.pm:admin-instant-product:local: newman run postman/collections/pm-admin-instant-product-controller.postman_collection.json -e postman/environments/pm-admin-local.postman_environment.json --reporters cli,json,junit,htmlextra --reporter-json-export reports/newman-admin-instant-product-local.json --reporter-junit-export reports/newman-admin-instant-product-local.xml --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/newman-admin-instant-product-local-dashboard.html --reporter-htmlextra-template postman/templates/htmlextra-inline-dashboard.hbs --reporter-htmlextra-browserTitle "PM Admin Instant Product Newman" --reporter-htmlextra-title "PM Admin · instant-products · local" --reporter-htmlextra-noSyntaxHighlighting --reporter-htmlextra-timezone "Asia/Shanghai" && node scripts/newman-json-to-zh-html.mjs reports/newman-admin-instant-product-local.json reports/controllers/pm-admin-instant-product-local.html --controller pm-admin-instant-product-local
scripts.pm:admin-instant-product:testnet: newman run postman/collections/pm-admin-instant-product-controller.postman_collection.json -e postman/environments/pm-admin-testnet.private.postman_environment.json --reporters cli,json,junit,htmlextra --reporter-json-export reports/newman-admin-instant-product.json --reporter-junit-export reports/newman-admin-instant-product.xml --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/newman-admin-instant-product-dashboard.html --reporter-htmlextra-template postman/templates/htmlextra-inline-dashboard.hbs --reporter-htmlextra-browserTitle "PM Admin Instant Product Newman" --reporter-htmlextra-title "PM Admin · instant-products · testnet" --reporter-htmlextra-noSyntaxHighlighting --reporter-htmlextra-timezone "Asia/Shanghai" && node scripts/newman-json-to-zh-html.mjs reports/newman-admin-instant-product.json reports/controllers/pm-admin-instant-product-testnet.html --controller pm-admin-instant-product-testnet
scripts.pm:ce-updown:local: newman run postman/collections/pm-ce-updown-local.postman_collection.json -e postman/environments/pm-ce-local.postman_environment.json --reporters cli,json,junit,htmlextra --reporter-json-export reports/newman-ce-updown-local.json --reporter-junit-export reports/newman-ce-updown-local.xml --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/newman-ce-updown-local-dashboard.html --reporter-htmlextra-template postman/templates/htmlextra-inline-dashboard.hbs --reporter-htmlextra-browserTitle "PM CE Updown Newman" --reporter-htmlextra-title "PM CE · updown · local" --reporter-htmlextra-noSyntaxHighlighting --reporter-htmlextra-timezone "Asia/Shanghai" && node scripts/newman-json-to-zh-html.mjs reports/newman-ce-updown-local.json reports/controllers/pm-ce-updown-local.html --controller pm-ce-updown-local && node scripts/build-reports-index.mjs
